briefs.title: WorkSafeBC dollar amounts adjusted upward effective January 1, 2026
briefs.summary: WorkSafeBC has updated the dollar amounts set out in the Workers Compensation Act, effective January 1, 2026. This means wage and benefit figures used to calculate worker injury payments and employer assessments will change in the new year.
briefs.action_required: Review your WorkSafeBC payroll assessments and worker benefit figures before January 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC WorkSafeBC adjusted dollar amounts take effect
